scripts.test:suite: vitest run && vite build && cd src-tauri && cargo test
scripts.test:schema: cd src-tauri && cargo test --test test_reference_db create_all_empty_schema_dbs -- --ignored --nocapture
scripts.test:db: cd src-tauri && cargo test --test test_reference_db populate_all_schema_dbs -- --ignored --nocapture
scripts.generate:types: cd src-tauri && set TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR=../src/lib/types/generated && cargo test export_bindings
